findings.description: The HTML includes fabricated stylesheet/theme content and an external Google Fonts URL that do not appear in the source PDF.
findings.evidence: HTML head contains invented text such as "Digital Commons NC — Standalone Theme CSS", CSS variables, and "@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Sans+3...")". The PDF pages only show the handout content (title, table, handout label, revised date) and do not contain any CSS/theme text or URLs.

findings.description: Heading structure is incomplete: the continuation page title is not represented as a heading in the HTML.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 2 prominently shows the heading "INSURANCE MAZE (CONTINUED)". HTML uses only one heading, "

THE INSURANCE MAZE

", and does not include a corresponding heading for the continued page.

findings.description: A text accuracy error changes the meaning in the burial exclusion guidance for whole life with dividend accumulations left to earn interest.
findings.evidence: PDF row "WHOLE LIFE with Dividend Accumulations left to earn interest" under BURIAL EXCLUSION reads: "See ‘Burial Exclusion’ for term insurance. Treat the same." HTML renders: "See “Burial Exclusion” for term insurance. Treat the same." The key word "insurance" is missing after "term", altering the referenced item.
